method: Grouped box plots/violin plots showing distributions of satisfaction_score, churn_score and CLTV split by customer_status. X-axis: status categories, Y-axis: metric values. Color encoding by customer_status (Stayed=green, Churned=red, Joined=blue).
objective: Compare key metric distributions across customer status groups to identify baseline differences

method: Pairwise scatter plot of CLTV vs Total Revenue with hexagonal binning. X-axis: CLTV, Y-axis: Total Revenue. Color encoding: customer_status. Size encoding: point density. Linked tooltip showing aggregated counts per bin.
objective: Identify financial value patterns and outliers across customer statuses

method: Grouped bar charts with age brackets on X-axis, gender/dependents as stacked segments. Color encoding: customer_status (3-color scale). Small multiples by dependent status.
objective: Analyze demographic clusters associated with different churn/retention patterns

method: Heatmap with geospatial aggregation using 0.1° grid cells. Color encoding: density of churn_value=1 (red intensity). Base map: California outline. Interactive brushing to select regions for detailed analysis.
objective: Identify geographical hotspots with concentrated churn activity

method: Interactive treemap with hierarchical grouping: 1st level-service_type, 2nd level-contract_type, 3rd level-payment_method. Size encoding: customer count. Color encoding: % Churned (red-yellow-green gradient). Linked filtering by customer_status.
objective: Reveal service/payment combinations with disproportionate churn rates

method: Parallel coordinates plot showing CLTV, churn_score and total_charges. Lines colored by customer_status. Interactive axis brushing to select value ranges. Highlight top 10% CLTV customers.
objective: Identify high-value customers at risk of churn based on score patterns

method: Stacked area chart showing tenure distribution by status (X-axis: months, Y-axis: % customers). Color encoding: customer_status. Interactive slider for tenure range selection.
objective: Analyze how relationship duration affects status transitions

method: Histogram with referral counts (0-5+) on X-axis, status proportions as stacked bars. Color encoding: customer_status. Curve overlay showing churn_rate vs referrals.
objective: Understand impact of referral programs on retention behavior
